0b8e29b2-2720-45e8-bfe7-d9c96f3cbe18.name: Prompt
0b8e29b2-2720-45e8-bfe7-d9c96f3cbe18.label: basic
0b8e29b2-2720-45e8-bfe7-d9c96f3cbe18.description:
Describe the motion, action, camera movement, and audio to generate from the source image. Write the prompt as a clear chronological shot description with concrete visual details and sound cues.

[Prompting guide: key elements](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#key-elements-to-include)
[Prompting guide: best results](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#for-best-results)

value.immediate: Glitch art infinite zoom, ultra-fast hyperloop paradigmatic nonsensical metaphysical noise, exploration of void

bdce500d-8d6f-45c7-b45b-5c739f7e3d38.name: Reference Image
bdce500d-8d6f-45c7-b45b-5c739f7e3d38.label: basic
bdce500d-8d6f-45c7-b45b-5c739f7e3d38.description: Starting image used to anchor composition, identity, and framing.

173e6d29-42c4-40b5-a264-93e5f5bb8d9c.name: Mode
173e6d29-42c4-40b5-a264-93e5f5bb8d9c.label: config
173e6d29-42c4-40b5-a264-93e5f5bb8d9c.description: Choose the generation branch. Turbo is faster for iteration; Full is slower and intended for higher quality.

078a008f-2845-49bc-8313-20ae66a69a9e.name: Resolution
078a008f-2845-49bc-8313-20ae66a69a9e.label: config
078a008f-2845-49bc-8313-20ae66a69a9e.description:
Choose a preset output size. Higher resolutions need more VRAM, and dimensions must stay divisible by 32.

[Official image-to-video guide: resolution](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#resolution)

a92a4aa6-3654-4bdc-82ed-c32c0d3d3712.name: Landscape Width
a92a4aa6-3654-4bdc-82ed-c32c0d3d3712.label: hidden
a92a4aa6-3654-4bdc-82ed-c32c0d3d3712.description: Choose between the Full HD and HD landscape widths.

45e68162-1fd6-43d3-8430-d08247bd551c.name: Landscape Height
45e68162-1fd6-43d3-8430-d08247bd551c.label: hidden
45e68162-1fd6-43d3-8430-d08247bd551c.description: Choose between the Full HD and HD landscape heights.

fdc3a830-f289-42f8-9d06-95c245e3311f.name: Full Sampling Steps
fdc3a830-f289-42f8-9d06-95c245e3311f.label: advanced
fdc3a830-f289-42f8-9d06-95c245e3311f.description: Base-pass sampling steps for Full mode. Higher values can improve quality but take longer.

fa36cf0f-220d-421a-8244-65171fd1a194.name: Distilled LoRA Weight
fa36cf0f-220d-421a-8244-65171fd1a194.label: advanced
fa36cf0f-220d-421a-8244-65171fd1a194.description: Strength of the distilled LoRA applied to the base model.

1260f477-eb62-45ce-93fe-621cc5c30d12.name: Full Distilled LoRA Weight
1260f477-eb62-45ce-93fe-621cc5c30d12.label: advanced
1260f477-eb62-45ce-93fe-621cc5c30d12.description: Distilled LoRA strength for the Full branch. The current official full-model guide recommends 0.6 for the Stage 2 distilled LoRA.

970356bd-d986-44fa-9cdd-5b362761373b.name: Turbo Distilled LoRA Weight
970356bd-d986-44fa-9cdd-5b362761373b.label: advanced
970356bd-d986-44fa-9cdd-5b362761373b.description: Distilled LoRA strength for the Turbo branch.

9494c737-aa13-4aca-abd1-8168248eaae3.name: Adapter LoRA Strength
9494c737-aa13-4aca-abd1-8168248eaae3.label: advanced
9494c737-aa13-4aca-abd1-8168248eaae3.description: Strength for the optional adapter LoRA. The default adapter is the LTX 2.3 Pop Art LoRA from Civitai.

d3bcb2a8-0bad-4457-8bb5-564194891646.name: Turbo Sampling Steps
d3bcb2a8-0bad-4457-8bb5-564194891646.label: advanced
d3bcb2a8-0bad-4457-8bb5-564194891646.description: Base-pass sampling steps for Turbo mode. Short schedules are intended for fast iteration.

a68d4b77-17fb-4ef9-8455-180c19f2f603.name: Sampling Steps
a68d4b77-17fb-4ef9-8455-180c19f2f603.label: advanced
a68d4b77-17fb-4ef9-8455-180c19f2f603.description:
Number of sampling steps used in the base generation pass. The official guide calls for 8 steps in the distilled workflow and 20-50 in the full workflow.

[Official image-to-video guide: steps](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#steps)

24139230-f0ea-48d7-8e40-45a6e53168f0.name: Video Frames
24139230-f0ea-48d7-8e40-45a6e53168f0.label: config
24139230-f0ea-48d7-8e40-45a6e53168f0.description:
Number of frames to generate. Keep to the standard counts used throughout the official examples, such as 65, 97, 121, 161, or 257. The official guide recommends 121-161 for balanced quality and memory usage, 65-97 for quick iterations, and 257 as the maximum.

[Official image-to-video guide: frame count](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#frame-count)

7fdd6512-be70-450e-98cf-b61141dccd2b.name: Frame Rate
7fdd6512-be70-450e-98cf-b61141dccd2b.label: config
7fdd6512-be70-450e-98cf-b61141dccd2b.description:
Frames per second. Keep it matched across conditioning, upscale, and final video output. The official guide recommends 24 for a cinematic feel, 25 as the default standard, and 30 for smoother action.

[Official image-to-video guide: frame rate](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#frame-rate)

f35bc556-8554-4fc2-8adc-00f1cc577025.name: Height
f35bc556-8554-4fc2-8adc-00f1cc577025.label: config
f35bc556-8554-4fc2-8adc-00f1cc577025.description: Output height from the selected resolution preset.

ec0af1d0-26cb-4336-bbbf-e900e807e42c.name: Reference Strength
ec0af1d0-26cb-4336-bbbf-e900e807e42c.label: advanced
ec0af1d0-26cb-4336-bbbf-e900e807e42c.description: How strongly the source image anchors the low-resolution pass. The upstream two-stage example uses 0.7.

2b238754-80b5-4e59-899b-e436dd00c44c.name: Upscale Reference Strength
2b238754-80b5-4e59-899b-e436dd00c44c.label: advanced
2b238754-80b5-4e59-899b-e436dd00c44c.description: How strongly the source image anchors the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses 1.

e7a5564f-0ef2-47d6-9ff0-3e609928f99f.name: Upscale Manual Sigmas
e7a5564f-0ef2-47d6-9ff0-3e609928f99f.label: advanced
e7a5564f-0ef2-47d6-9ff0-3e609928f99f.description: Manual sigma schedule for the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses four values here.

4c25e1f7-9255-4a01-8b03-8cb84f92354f.name: Upscale
4c25e1f7-9255-4a01-8b03-8cb84f92354f.label: config
4c25e1f7-9255-4a01-8b03-8cb84f92354f.description:
Enable the second pass that doubles resolution and refines detail. Disable it to preview the base pass faster. The official guide recommends previewing Stage 1 first, then enabling the upscale pass once motion and framing are locked.

[Official image-to-video guide: Stage 2 upscale pass](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#stage-2-upscale-pass)

77f80716-e490-4444-8d41-4f381e5213f9.name: 2x
77f80716-e490-4444-8d41-4f381e5213f9.label: config
77f80716-e490-4444-8d41-4f381e5213f9.description: Enable the temporal x2 pass after the spatial upscale pass. This doubles the final framerate to preserve duration and is intended to be used together with Upscale.

8915dcbc-c21f-4282-a419-9de2a6e32773.name: Lora
8915dcbc-c21f-4282-a419-9de2a6e32773.label: config
8915dcbc-c21f-4282-a419-9de2a6e32773.description: Use the optional adapter LoRA for this generation.

a6e3401a-d354-4324-bc0f-5170169ae109.name: Adapter LoRA Trigger
a6e3401a-d354-4324-bc0f-5170169ae109.label: advanced
a6e3401a-d354-4324-bc0f-5170169ae109.description: Trigger text prepended to the prompt when the adapter LoRA is enabled. The default Pop Art adapter uses p0p-@rt.

86e6b393-07b7-4f08-9c05-aeebbd9bf048.name: Seed
86e6b393-07b7-4f08-9c05-aeebbd9bf048.label: config
86e6b393-07b7-4f08-9c05-aeebbd9bf048.description:
Controls random variation. Keep it fixed for repeatable comparisons, or change it to explore motion variants.

[Official image-to-video guide: seed](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#seed)

91936698-03dc-47db-8069-73ba1938a21b.name: Width
91936698-03dc-47db-8069-73ba1938a21b.label: config
91936698-03dc-47db-8069-73ba1938a21b.description: Output width from the selected resolution preset.

8e31310d-415d-4111-9496-90f2dfc9764d.name: Model Variant
8e31310d-415d-4111-9496-90f2dfc9764d.label: config
8e31310d-415d-4111-9496-90f2dfc9764d.description: Select the LTX 2.3 model package used for generation.

f683a23d-5ff0-48e8-8f40-2363f968b295.name: Apply Adapter LoRA
f683a23d-5ff0-48e8-8f40-2363f968b295.label: advanced
f683a23d-5ff0-48e8-8f40-2363f968b295.description: Apply the optional adapter LoRA after the distilled LoRA.

3e01b397-13c8-4c56-ab89-7f2538069a94.name: Selected Model
3e01b397-13c8-4c56-ab89-7f2538069a94.label: advanced
3e01b397-13c8-4c56-ab89-7f2538069a94.description: Switches between the standard LTX 2.3 model path and the adapter LoRA path.

3959477f-4f8a-43c6-81a4-49465ee90e8f.name: NVIDIA FP4 Checkpoint URL
3959477f-4f8a-43c6-81a4-49465ee90e8f.label: advanced
3959477f-4f8a-43c6-81a4-49465ee90e8f.description: LTX 2.3 NVFP4 checkpoint from the Civitai FP4 package.

c0f8d689-113f-494d-a7ce-6ffcfdfe1ae9.name: NVIDIA FP4 Text Projection URL
c0f8d689-113f-494d-a7ce-6ffcfdfe1ae9.label: advanced
c0f8d689-113f-494d-a7ce-6ffcfdfe1ae9.description: Text projection file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

36dbf4c6-cf11-4e9f-a6de-a67d30cf2e8c.name: NVIDIA FP4 Video VAE URL
36dbf4c6-cf11-4e9f-a6de-a67d30cf2e8c.label: advanced
36dbf4c6-cf11-4e9f-a6de-a67d30cf2e8c.description: Video VAE file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

30aa6004-bcf5-48c5-a8fa-e7917e3cb0ee.name: NVIDIA FP4 Audio VAE URL
30aa6004-bcf5-48c5-a8fa-e7917e3cb0ee.label: advanced
30aa6004-bcf5-48c5-a8fa-e7917e3cb0ee.description: Audio VAE file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

d66794d9-e4bc-41e0-ad22-4791bd9bff2e.name: Selected Checkpoint
d66794d9-e4bc-41e0-ad22-4791bd9bff2e.label: advanced
d66794d9-e4bc-41e0-ad22-4791bd9bff2e.description: Switches between the standard LTX 2.3 checkpoint and the NVIDIA FP4 checkpoint.

9d3fdefb-989d-4249-a34f-dade674dca4b.name: Selected Text Projection
9d3fdefb-989d-4249-a34f-dade674dca4b.label: advanced
9d3fdefb-989d-4249-a34f-dade674dca4b.description: Switches between the standard text projection and the NVIDIA FP4 package text projection.

498a1073-5f55-43da-b10c-945057c3b26d.name: Selected Video VAE
498a1073-5f55-43da-b10c-945057c3b26d.label: advanced
498a1073-5f55-43da-b10c-945057c3b26d.description: Switches between the checkpoint VAE and the NVIDIA FP4 package video VAE.

4af5c318-2d8a-4933-b8e7-2cb5b0921d6b.name: Selected Audio VAE
4af5c318-2d8a-4933-b8e7-2cb5b0921d6b.label: advanced
4af5c318-2d8a-4933-b8e7-2cb5b0921d6b.description: Switches between the standard audio VAE and the NVIDIA FP4 package audio VAE.

20e78605-bf6a-47fa-8b40-670526787cf6.name: Base Guidance
20e78605-bf6a-47fa-8b40-670526787cf6.label: advanced
20e78605-bf6a-47fa-8b40-670526787cf6.description:
Classifier-free guidance for the base pass. Upstream two-stage examples keep this close to 1.

[Official image-to-video guide: CFG](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#cfg-classifier-free-guidance)

5b98baf0-c642-422f-87b9-de9e62564f28.name: Base Sampler Type
5b98baf0-c642-422f-87b9-de9e62564f28.label: advanced
5b98baf0-c642-422f-87b9-de9e62564f28.description:
Sampler used in the base generation pass.

[Official image-to-video guide: sampler type](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#sampler-type)

a930656e-fb03-4f90-9c15-1cec9d38d848.name: Full Base Sampler Type
a930656e-fb03-4f90-9c15-1cec9d38d848.label: advanced
a930656e-fb03-4f90-9c15-1cec9d38d848.description: Base-pass sampler for the Full branch.

38953e90-de20-4453-839e-01d20a552a5d.name: Turbo Base Sampler Type
38953e90-de20-4453-839e-01d20a552a5d.label: advanced
38953e90-de20-4453-839e-01d20a552a5d.description: Base-pass sampler for the Turbo branch.

ea71367e-0bf4-4534-8cac-f4837bcc4778.name: Base Shift
ea71367e-0bf4-4534-8cac-f4837bcc4778.label: advanced
ea71367e-0bf4-4534-8cac-f4837bcc4778.description: Scheduler shift value for the base pass.

8bae6414-bb56-4d6c-a013-e691ecbb463d.name: Batch Size
8bae6414-bb56-4d6c-a013-e691ecbb463d.label: advanced
8bae6414-bb56-4d6c-a013-e691ecbb463d.description: Number of videos generated in one run. Higher values need more memory.

c2dd209d-411f-4f3f-baec-1a5fe0f0c5ae.name: Disable Image Injection
c2dd209d-411f-4f3f-baec-1a5fe0f0c5ae.label: advanced
c2dd209d-411f-4f3f-baec-1a5fe0f0c5ae.description: Bypass image conditioning and behave more like text-to-video. Leave disabled for normal image-to-video use.

fd264bb9-8520-42bb-b9ba-bd37411d1a0f.name: Frame Rate (float)
fd264bb9-8520-42bb-b9ba-bd37411d1a0f.label: hidden
fd264bb9-8520-42bb-b9ba-bd37411d1a0f.description: Floating-point fps value fed into conditioning and final video creation nodes.

a437ab6a-507f-433e-8062-92db3ba76220.name: Float Zero
a437ab6a-507f-433e-8062-92db3ba76220.label: hidden
a437ab6a-507f-433e-8062-92db3ba76220.description: Hidden helper to cast integer fps controls onto floating-point paths.

ea1c33e9-e340-480a-a310-5bf3d91e5d3e.name: Float Two
ea1c33e9-e340-480a-a310-5bf3d91e5d3e.label: hidden
ea1c33e9-e340-480a-a310-5bf3d91e5d3e.description: Hidden helper to double FPS when interpolation is enabled.

a7abdf35-1d4e-477f-a51d-3a9625c9fc8a.name: Interpolated Frame Rate (float)
a7abdf35-1d4e-477f-a51d-3a9625c9fc8a.label: hidden
a7abdf35-1d4e-477f-a51d-3a9625c9fc8a.description: Hidden helper that doubles the output FPS when interpolation is enabled.

c72dcbdb-de2e-4e90-8bbc-f96f8bbfeb43.name: Input Compression
c72dcbdb-de2e-4e90-8bbc-f96f8bbfeb43.label: advanced
c72dcbdb-de2e-4e90-8bbc-f96f8bbfeb43.description: Compression value used when preprocessing the source image for LTX conditioning.

f0b81208-873f-47ae-86b6-19fa3358554b.name: Latent Scale Helper
f0b81208-873f-47ae-86b6-19fa3358554b.label: advanced
f0b81208-873f-47ae-86b6-19fa3358554b.description: Scale factor used to build the lower-resolution latent canvas before upscaling.

81bccff1-6818-441e-a2cb-38df086369d7.name: Guide Scale Helper
81bccff1-6818-441e-a2cb-38df086369d7.label: advanced
81bccff1-6818-441e-a2cb-38df086369d7.description: Scale factor used to size guide images before preprocessing and injection.

4f61d19f-c3ff-456e-8208-35c40e1121ee.name: Max Shift
4f61d19f-c3ff-456e-8208-35c40e1121ee.label: advanced
4f61d19f-c3ff-456e-8208-35c40e1121ee.description: Upper scheduler shift bound for the base pass.

155b20b1-5ec4-4347-96ea-365c779b5949.name: Scale Method
155b20b1-5ec4-4347-96ea-365c779b5949.label: advanced
155b20b1-5ec4-4347-96ea-365c779b5949.description: Resampling method used when resizing images inside the workflow.

4127d0cd-9fa4-4a32-a9b4-9d244689598a.name: Scheduler Terminal
4127d0cd-9fa4-4a32-a9b4-9d244689598a.label: advanced
4127d0cd-9fa4-4a32-a9b4-9d244689598a.description: Terminal value used by the LTX scheduler in the base pass.

729b2a1b-1796-4110-a0b6-01c4500f8ad8.name: Stretch Schedule
729b2a1b-1796-4110-a0b6-01c4500f8ad8.label: advanced
729b2a1b-1796-4110-a0b6-01c4500f8ad8.description: Whether the base-pass scheduler stretches its schedule across the latent sequence.

5aa71684-922b-4a53-bd9d-b000b6fbc6ef.name: Upscale Guidance
5aa71684-922b-4a53-bd9d-b000b6fbc6ef.label: advanced
5aa71684-922b-4a53-bd9d-b000b6fbc6ef.description:
Classifier-free guidance for the upscale pass. Keep it close to 1 unless you are intentionally retuning.

[Official image-to-video guide: CFG](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#cfg-classifier-free-guidance)

3544c485-1c43-45b0-8f53-1b345ab2ea46.name: Upscale Sampler Type
3544c485-1c43-45b0-8f53-1b345ab2ea46.label: advanced
3544c485-1c43-45b0-8f53-1b345ab2ea46.description:
Sampler used in the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses euler_cfg_pp.

[Official image-to-video guide: sampler type](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#sampler-type)

362cfab7-f4d0-4b6d-806e-c4fc8966ed5b.name: Upscale Seed
362cfab7-f4d0-4b6d-806e-c4fc8966ed5b.label: config
362cfab7-f4d0-4b6d-806e-c4fc8966ed5b.description:
Seed for the upscale pass. Keep it fixed to compare detail changes consistently. The official guide recommends fixed seeds when iterating and previewing Stage 1 versus the final upscale pass.

[Official image-to-video guide: seed](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#seed)
[Official image-to-video guide: Stage 2 upscale pass](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#stage-2-upscale-pass)

d0dbf439-1029-4d1f-9be4-47e91dc4cf3d.name: Resize Crop
d0dbf439-1029-4d1f-9be4-47e91dc4cf3d.label: config
d0dbf439-1029-4d1f-9be4-47e91dc4cf3d.description: How to handle aspect-ratio mismatch when resizing the source image. Center preserves aspect ratio by cropping; disabled stretches to fit.

ca01e26b-9b4c-49ab-be9a-453dd0f08b51.name: Negative Prompt
ca01e26b-9b4c-49ab-be9a-453dd0f08b51.label: advanced
ca01e26b-9b4c-49ab-be9a-453dd0f08b51.description:
Describe unwanted motion, objects, style, or artifacts to avoid in the result. Keep it short, concrete, and focused on failure modes you do not want in the shot.

[Prompting guide: what to avoid](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#what-to-avoid)

value.immediate: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles

6888725b-7306-47c9-9859-11e650657d16.name: Adapter Prompt
6888725b-7306-47c9-9859-11e650657d16.label: advanced
6888725b-7306-47c9-9859-11e650657d16.description: Prompt with the adapter LoRA trigger prepended.

56b9a9cd-8d96-4659-a51f-2a3b39975621.name: Selected Prompt
56b9a9cd-8d96-4659-a51f-2a3b39975621.label: advanced
56b9a9cd-8d96-4659-a51f-2a3b39975621.description: Switches between the original prompt and the adapter-triggered prompt.

d48cc0db-c50e-4ab4-913b-320cb0cecfad.name: Selected Output Audio
d48cc0db-c50e-4ab4-913b-320cb0cecfad.label: advanced
d48cc0db-c50e-4ab4-913b-320cb0cecfad.description: Select which audio stream is attached to the final video output.

821f9fda-5fd3-457b-a2eb-25809b4df4bc.name: Selected Upscaled Frames
821f9fda-5fd3-457b-a2eb-25809b4df4bc.label: advanced
821f9fda-5fd3-457b-a2eb-25809b4df4bc.description: Select whether the upscaled output uses the spatial result or the interpolated result.

8f35abf3-2e6d-4bae-a977-8915c1e3c266.name: Selected Output Frames
8f35abf3-2e6d-4bae-a977-8915c1e3c266.label: advanced
8f35abf3-2e6d-4bae-a977-8915c1e3c266.description: Select whether the final video uses base-pass frames or the upscaled result.

c4c50d44-7ea1-4467-9cfc-a2dc94820cfd.name: Selected Upscaled FPS
c4c50d44-7ea1-4467-9cfc-a2dc94820cfd.label: hidden
c4c50d44-7ea1-4467-9cfc-a2dc94820cfd.description: Select whether the upscaled output uses the base FPS or doubled FPS for interpolation.

3136e07f-2b7d-498b-b70d-81d4d51a915e.name: Selected Output FPS
3136e07f-2b7d-498b-b70d-81d4d51a915e.label: hidden
